properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 158/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 INTERNATIONAL ROCKET CAMPAIGN ACES II FROM ANDOYA SPACE

 TWO SCIENTIFIC SOUNDING ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOYA SPACES LAUNCH SITE IN OKSBAASEN
 ANDOYA IN THE PERIOD FROM 16 TO 30NOV 22.
 THE LAUNCHES WILL BE CONDUCTED ANY DAY BETWEEN 1645UTC TO 2145UTC, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD

 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE TWO DANGER AREAS

 DANGER AREA ACES II INNER
 A. 69-22.70N 015-50.00E
 B. 69-26.30N 015-57.00E
 C. 69-23.70N 016-08.30E
 D. 69-17.70N 016-03.80E
 E. 69-17.00N 016-01.30E
 F. 69-17.60N 015-57.60E
 G. 69-22.70N 015-50.00E

 DANGER AREA ACES II OUTER
 A. 72-48.30N 014-16.80E
 B. 72-53.00N 016-04.50E
 C. 73-20.80N 017-23.80E
 D. 74-47.70N 016-42.80E
 E. 75-03.00N 014-55.10E
 F. 74-57.50N 012-28.50E
 G. 74-36.40N 011-20.50E
 H. 73-01.50N 012-27.80E
 I. 72-48.32N 014-16.87E

 ANDOYA SPACE RANGE CONTROL WILL BE MANNED 3 HOURS PRIOR TO START OF ACTIVITIES
 FOR STATUS UPDATES VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO BE IN CONTACT WITH ANDOYA SPACE ON VHF CH 14 OR 16.
 IF OUTSIDE VHF RANGE OF LAUNCH SITE USE PHONE NO +47 7614 4426
 FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO AND WWW.BARENTSWACH.NO FISKEINFO.
  
 CANCEL THIS WARNINGS 302145UTC NOV 22.
